targets.rawSql: SELECT intent, model AS selected_model, count() AS cnt FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND intent != '' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY intent, model ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT intent, backend AS selected_backend, count() AS cnt FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND intent != '' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY intent, backend ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, countIf(fallback_used = 1) AS fallbacks, count() AS total FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT fallback_reason, count() AS cnt FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND fallback_used = 1 AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND fallback_reason != '' GROUP BY fallback_reason ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT model AS selected_model, backend AS selected_backend, intent, count() AS cnt, round(avg(total_latency_ms)) AS avg_latency FROM ai_symbiont.llm_events WHERE event = 'request_completed' AND timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY model, backend, intent ORDER BY cnt DESC
